data.title: Huey Magoo's opens new location in Miami, FL, offering hand-crafted chicken tenders to more guests. Rapid expansion continues.
data.description: A popular chicken tenders brand is rapidly expanding, providing customers with new options for customization such as hand-breaded and grilled choices, house-made sauces, and other menu items made in-house. This news comes from Miami on Feb. 13, 2026. Huey Magoo's is unveiling these offerings as part of their growth, aiming to cater to a wider audience. With a focus on quality and variety, they are set to revolutionize the chicken tenders industry. Stay tuned for more updates on their increasing success.

data.title: Cosign guarantor platform expands to Valdosta, improves renter access, addresses rising rents. - Feb. 13, 2026
data.description: A new guarantor platform called Cosign has been introduced in Valdosta, Georgia on February 13, 2026. As rental prices continue to increase in the market, this platform aims to address outdated approval measures and assist in filling units. Cosign serves as a third-party service that aims to broaden renter opportunities while also safeguarding property owners. This initiative comes amidst a rise in rents, providing relief to landlords as they seek suitable tenants. By streamlining the approval process, Cosign offers a solution to the challenges faced by both renters and property owners in the current rental market.

data.title: Hyperscale Data declares monthly dividends of $0.2708333 per Series D share and $0.20833 per Series E share, on Feb 13, 2026.
data.description: Hyperscale Data has announced its declaration of a monthly cash dividend of $0.20833 per share for its 10.00% Series E Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock. The company, identified as Hyperscale Data, Inc., is listed on NYSE American under the ticker symbol GPUS. This news was released on Feb. 13, 2026, indicating the company's position as an artificial intelligence ("AI") data center entity based in Las Vegas.

data.title: Entertainment Earth celebrates 30th anniversary by honoring leading toy retailers at Toy Fair; retailers shaping industry future.
data.description: In Los Angeles on February 13, 2026, Entertainment Earth marked its 30th anniversary by honoring independent toy retailers who are influencing the future of the toy industry. This event coincides with the start of New York Toy Fair.

data.title: Sister cities Penza, Le Mans, and Merri-bek send New Year wishes to Xianyang, China amidst Chinese New Year celebrations.
data.description: As the Chinese New Year of the Horse draws near, sister cities from various countries, such as Penza in Russia, Le Mans in France, and Merri-bek (formerly Moreland) in Australia, have conveyed their warm greetings to Xianyang. This exchange of festive wishes highlights the global connections and cultural celebrations surrounding this lunar festival. The participation of these international sister cities underscores the significance and reach of Chinese New Year traditions, with Xianyang serving as a focal point for cultural exchange. This showcases the international relationships nurtured through cultural events, with diverse regions joining in the celebrations.

data.title: Volue welcomes TA Associates as their new strategic investor, joining Advent International, Generation Investment Management, and Arendals Fossekompani.
data.description: Volue, a prominent player in electrification and energy technology, revealed that TA Associates, a renowned global private equity firm, has become a strategic investor along with existing investors Advent International, Generation Investment Management, and Arendals Fossekompani. In the last year and a half, Volue has strategically pivoted its attention towards the energy industry by divesting non-essential operations. This move signifies a new direction for the company as it solidifies its position in the market.

data.title: Elkem ASA in Norway to sell majority of Silicones division, announces extraordinary general meeting.
data.description: In Oslo, Norway on February 13, 2026, Elkem ASA ("Elkem") made a stock exchange announcement about an agreement to sell a majority stake in its Silicones division. The agreement titled "Share Purchase Agreement" involves the sale of a significant portion of the division's assets. This move signifies a strategic decision by Elkem to restructure its business operations. The exact details of the deal, including financial figures and parties involved, were not disclosed in the announcement. This transaction marks a substantial development for Elkem and highlights its focus on reshaping its portfolio for future growth.

data.title: S&P Global Ratings named Ratings Provider of the Year at Private Equity Wire European Awards. London, Feb. 13, 2026.
data.description: S&P Global Ratings received the prestigious Ratings Provider of the Year award at the 2026 Private Equity Wire European Awards in London on February 13. This recognition highlights their outstanding contribution to improving credit insights within European private markets. The event took place on Thursday, February 12, underscoring S&P Global Ratings' significant impact in the industry.

data.title: MILGARD chosen for 2025 Northwest Idea House by Zetterberg Custom Homes in Gig Harbor, WA; 5,428-square-foot project showcased contemporary Northwest architecture.
data.description: Milgard® Windows and Doors, a part of the MITER Brands portfolio, has been selected as the preferred window and door brand for the newly unveiled 2025 Northwest Idea House. The collaboration with Zetterberg Custom Homes for South Sound magazine’s Idea House in Gig Harbor, WA, showcases a 5,428-square-foot design curated by Greg Zetterberg's design vision and Jeff Zetterberg's construction proficiency. The project spotlights contemporary Northwest architecture, prioritizing natural light and modern aesthetics.

data.title: Elon Musk criticizes Anthropic AI as 'misanthropic' after $30B funding round in escalating founder feud.
data.description: As the competition between top AI company founders intensifies in the public eye, Anthropic has successfully secured a new round of funding. This development comes at a crucial time as financial backing becomes more vital in the highly competitive industry. The exact amount raised in the funding round was not disclosed, but the significance of the investment underscores the growing importance of financial support in the AI sector. The escalating rivalry among key players in the field suggests that securing funding is not only a strategic move but also a necessary step towards maintaining a competitive edge in the market.

data.title: Experian wins 2026 HousingWire Tech100 Mortgage award for Self-Service Prescreen technology.
data.description: Experian, a company based in Costa Mesa, California, revealed today that it has received the prestigious 2026 HousingWire Tech100 Mortgage award for its Experian Self-Service Prescreen technology.

data.title: Nu Skin reports Q4 2025 results with revenue at $370.32M ( ↓16.9% YoY), EPS at 29 cents (missed analyst expectations), stock sinks after weak quarter and soft outlook. Customer base down 10%, paid affiliates down 11%, sales leaders down 19%. Gross margin up to 70.7%, operating margin improves to 6.3%.
data.description: Nu Skin Enterprises Inc. (NYSE: NUS) released its fourth-quarter 2025 financial results and a 2026 outlook. The stock dropped post-announcement as the company fell short of analyst predictions. They reported a GAAP diluted EPS of 29 cents, missing the estimated 30 cents, and revenue of $370.32 million, below the expected $382.70 million. Compared to last year's $445.55 million, revenue decreased by 16.9%. Adjusted EPS was 29 cents, down from 38 cents the previous year. Gross margin rose to 70.7% from 62.7%, while operating margin improved to 6.3% from a negative 11.9%. The customer base dwindled by 10% to 748,796, paid affiliates decreased by 11% to 129,311, and sales leaders dropped by 19% to 30,045. The company noted the distribution of over 20,000 Prysm iO devices.
